lines.en: Good morning, Lily. Are you here for your vaccine?
lines.zh: 早上好，莉莉。你是来打疫苗的吗？

lines.en: Yes, but I am a little scared.
Do not worry. It will be very quick.
Just a little pinch. Like an ant biting you.
lines.zh: 就像蚂蚁咬一下。只有一点点疼。

lines.en: Hold out your left arm. Good girl!
You did great! Press this cotton ball for a few minutes.
lines.zh: 你真棒！按住这个棉球几分钟。

lines.en: Thank you, Nurse. That was easy!
